response: This function implements the reservoir sampling algorithm to randomly select a fixed-size sample of `k` items from a stream of unknown or large length, ensuring each item in the stream has an equal probability of being included in the final sample. It initializes the reservoir with the first `k` items, then for each subsequent item at index `i`, it randomly chooses an index `j` from 0 to `i` and replaces the item at `reservoir[j]` if `j < k`, which effectively gives the new item a `k/(i+1)` chance of inclusion.
